name: Sullivan Minimal Models & Rational Homotopy
description: Sullivan's rational homotopy theory: algebraic models for spaces when primes are ignored. A Sullivan minimal model is a CDGA (∧V, d) with d: V → ∧²V, quasi-isomorphic to the algebra of piecewise polynomial forms. Equivalence: simply-connected rational homotopy types ↔ minimal CDGAs. H(X;ℚ) ≅ H(∧V); πₙ(X)⊗ℚ ≅ Hom(Vⁿ,ℚ). Parallel to Quillen's DGL approach.
